***order denying defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for summary judgment signed after hearing.***)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2022 Continued To Feb-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ROBERT STRICKLAND, Esq. of Strickland Law Group (Tel: 707-347-9123) for plaintiff Michael Oakes;
Atty. AMY P. FRENZEN, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3885) for defendant City and County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

The Court and counsel discuss the issue re: plaintiff having filed an unsigned declaration, and then having refiled a signed version of the declaration only yesterday.

The Court continues this matter for further hearing to February 28, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

The Court authorizes the defendant to file a supplemental reply no later than February 18, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
